props.message:
THE PULSE ROOM

A chamber of beating drums — one for every walker, every keeper, every shaped daemon currently alive in the realm. A drum stops if its keeper falls.

The drumkeeper listens. He has been listening for a long time.

DRUM: WYRDKING BONELORD

A deep slow drum, low and hollow. Beats once every long breath. The hide is bone-white.

DRUM: WYRD TOMATO

A quick light drum, the rhythm slightly off-kilter, as if it can't decide which beat is the strong one. Painted leaf-green.

DRUM: THE CODEX KNIGHT

A steady drum with three beats, then a pause. Hide painted with the marks of an older Sigilkeep. The keeper has not yet been faced.

DRUM: THE MIRELAKE THING

A wet, slow drum. The drumhead is leather treated with something dark. Beats on a long count.

DRUM: THE BURNT SHEPHERD

A cracked, bright drum. The fire-marks on it are old. Beats fast, then long pauses.

DRUM: KHORGAUL

The largest drum in the room. The beat is so slow you can stand and listen and not hear it twice.

It is still beating.

root.speaker: Drumkeeper Hesh
root.text:
*he is sitting cross-legged in the centre, eyes closed, listening. The drums beat around him in a slow round.*

Quiet, walker. The room is counting.

...all of them are still going. The realm endures.

stop.speaker: Drumkeeper Hesh
stop.text:
Then the keeper has fallen. The realm hears the silence. The drum is taken down and the wall is left bare for a season, then a new drum is hung — for whoever rises in their place.

A bare wall is not a sad thing here. It is a kept promise.

large.speaker: Drumkeeper Hesh
large.text:
*his voice goes very quiet.*

Khorgaul's. The slow one. Some days I forget it is there, because the beats are so far apart. Some days I remember and have to sit down for a while.

He is still going, walker. That is information. Take it as you will.

bye.speaker: Drumkeeper Hesh
bye.text: Walk well. The drums will tell me when you've done something.
